description: Creates a generated template from existing resources using the CloudFormation IaC Generator.

GeneratedTemplateId.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the generated template.
GeneratedTemplateId.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the generated template.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

GeneratedTemplateName.description: The name assigned to the generated template.
GeneratedTemplateName.markdownDescription:
The name assigned to the generated template.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Status.description: The status of the template generation.
Status.markdownDescription:
The status of the template generation.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: CREATE_PENDING | UPDATE_PENDING | DELETE_PENDING | CREATE_IN_PROGRESS | UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS | DELETE_IN_PROGRESS | FAILED | COMPLETE  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreationTime.description: The time the generated template was created.
CreationTime.markdownDescription:
The time the generated template was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

LastUpdatedTime.description: The time the generated template was last updated.
LastUpdatedTime.markdownDescription:
The time the generated template was last updated.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

TotalWarnings.markdownDescription:
The number of warnings generated for this template.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
